goal: Create bridge module that translates plan tasks into agent-executable descriptions, and an implementer agent with claim-execute-verify-close cycle

tasks.name: Create bridge module
tasks.action: Create scripts/memory/bridge.py with plan_to_task_descriptions() and generate_implement_prompt() functions. Reads NN-PLAN.json, ensures memory issues exist, generates rich agent prompts with context/files/verify/memory instructions.
verify: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '.'); from scripts.memory.bridge import plan_to_task_descriptions, generate_implement_prompt; print('OK')"

tasks.name: Create implementer agent
tasks.action: Create .claude/agents/implementer.md with frontmatter (name, description, tools, model, memory) and body instructing agent to: claim memory issue, read files, implement changes, run verify commands, close on success, notify leader on failure.

tasks.name: Expose bridge in public API
tasks.action: Add imports from .bridge and add plan_to_task_descriptions, generate_implement_prompt to __all__ list.
verify: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '.'); from scripts.memory import plan_to_task_descriptions, generate_implement_prompt; print('OK')"

planVerify: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '.'); from scripts.memory import plan_to_task_descriptions; print('OK')" && test -f .claude/agents/implementer.md && python3 .cnogo/scripts/workflow_validate.py
commitMessage: feat(team-implement-integration): add bridge module and implementer agent
